QF.id: Issue Management - General Obligations and Due Diligence_56

question.text: Within how many days from the completion of all post-issue activities must the post-issue advertisement be released?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The post-issue advertisement must be released within 10 days from the completion of all post-issue activities such as allotment, refunds, credit of shares, and listing. **The Trap:** 7 days is a common distractor because many SEBI timelines use 7 working days. 15 days confuses this with other regulatory timelines. **Cross-Exam Context:** Post-issue advertising requirements are tested in NISM Series IX. NISM Series XXI (Portfolio Management) may reference similar disclosure timelines. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The post-issue advertisement is a critical transparency measure — it ensures that all market participants and applicants know the outcome of the issue promptly.
